components.button: Large size, highly visible. Solid background for primary action. Include icons on the left for clarity. Rounded-2xl.
components.card: White background, soft 1px border (#EAE6DF), slight shadow (shadow-sm). Do not use complex glassmorphism.
components.input: Large input fields with clear labels above. High contrast border. Font size text-lg.
components.tabs: Use button-like tabs that are easy to tap, avoiding small underlined text.
components.notification_badge: Large circle, bright terracotta (#D86246) color, clear numbers.

icons.style: Simple, large stroke width (2px or more), easily recognizable.

hero_background.description: Warm organic shapes, beige and sage green background for header or hero section.

user_avatar.description: Smiling elderly man in suit, used for user profile avatar placeholder.

news_placeholder_1.description: Coffee and newspaper on desk, used as default image for news cards.

news_placeholder_2.description: Fresh cup of coffee resting on a newspaper.

specific_instructions_to_agent: Prioritize accessibility: use text-lg as base text size, not text-sm. The app is targeted to the elderly, readability is #1 priority.
Ensure all buttons and inputs have min-h-[56px] for easy tapping by elderly users.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Avoid confusing drop-down menus; use large radio buttons, toggle cards, or simple list selections where possible.
Maintain high contrast ratios. Never use light grey text on white backgrounds. Follow minimum 4.5:1 ratio.
Use Work Sans for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text to maintain friendliness and extreme clarity.
Keep navigation extremely simple. Avoid hidden hamburger menus on desktop; use a sticky top navigation or highly visible sidebar.
In the news feed, show large article cards with clear source badges (e.g., 'Naver', 'DART') and AI summary tags.
When customizing Shadcn components, override heights and paddings to be much larger and generous.
